query:
SELECT lessonId, COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN questionType = 'multiple_choice' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mc_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN questionType = 'short_answer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as short_answer_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN questionType = 'true_false' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as true_false_count
FROM quiz_questions 
WHERE lessonId BETWEEN 600001 AND 600010
GROUP BY lessonId
ORDER BY lessonId;
